name: Dexory Cloud
description: Cloud toolbox panel for Dexory Cloud servers. Open it from the Toolbox menu (it does NOT appear in the Streaming combo): browse the catalog (Lua metadata predicate filter, multi-topic selection, time-range), then Fetch to bounded-horizon download the selected session right there. Topic decoding is delegated to the host's MessageParser plugins (parser_ros) via the toolbox parser-ingest API; tf, pointclouds and images arrive as 3D/2D-capable object topics. The plugin ships no message decoders.
author: PlotJuggler Team
